name: West Indies Pepper Pot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Short Rib of Beef, 3-inch pieces
1 1/2 lb Stew Beef, cut into 2-inch cubes
1 Large Green Pepper, cleaned and sliced
4 Medium Sweet Potatoes, peeled and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cleaned and sliced
2. Pealed and cubed
- Brown salt pork and short rib pieces in a large kettle.
- Brown the beef on all sides.
- Pour in water and slowly bring to a boil. Skim the surface.
- Add thyme, salt, and pepper. Lower heat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour, removing any scum that rises to the top.
3. In a skillet, saute onion, garlic, and scallions in heated oil until tender. Add green pepper and saute for 1 minute. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. After meat has cooked for 1 hour, add the sauteed vegetables and other ingredients to the kettle. Continue to cook slowly, covered, for about 30 minutes until vegetables and meat are cooked. Remove from heat and cool slightly. Take out short ribs and cut off any fat. Cube the meat and return it to the kettle. Reheat if necessary.
Serves 8.
